allow: Bash(node -e "const pty = require\(''node-pty''\); const p = pty.spawn\(''/bin/zsh'', [], { name: ''xterm-256color'', cols: 80, rows: 24, cwd: require\(''os''\).homedir\(\) }\); p.onData\(d => { console.log\(''SUCCESS''\); p.kill\(\); process.exit\(0\); }\); p.write\(''echo hi\\r''\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { p.kill\(\); process.exit\(1\); }, 3000\);")

Bash(node -e "const pty = require\(''node-pty''\); const p = pty.spawn\(''/bin/zsh'', [], { name: ''xterm-256color'', cols: 80, rows: 24, cwd: require\(''os''\).homedir\(\) }\); p.onData\(d => { console.log\(''SUCCESS:'', JSON.stringify\(d.substring\(0,50\)\)\); p.kill\(\); process.exit\(0\); }\); p.write\(''echo hi\\r''\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\(''TIMEOUT''\); p.kill\(\); process.exit\(1\); }, 3000\);")
